summary: Excellent soundboard capture praised for clarity, but the pitch runs fast and needs correction
review: Reviewers laud the overall audio quality of this recording, calling it excellent and a great addition to the archive. The only consistent criticism is that the transfer plays slightly fast, suggesting a speed‑calibration fix would make it perfect. No musical performance details are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 5‑star ratings and praised the sound, but they repeatedly mention a speed/pitch issue that detracts from an otherwise excellent capture.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and well‑balanced recording, but playback is noticeably fast; requires pitch/speed calibration.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information about the performance or setlist was provided in the reviews.
